15	package coralnpu
16	
17	import chisel3._
18	import chisel3.util._
19	
20	import bus.AxiMasterIO
21	import common._
22	import _root_.circt.stage.{ChiselStage,FirtoolOption}
23	import chisel3.stage.ChiselGeneratorAnnotation
24	import scala.annotation.nowarn
25	
26	object L1DCache {
27	  def apply(p: Parameters): L1DCache = {
28	    return Module(new L1DCache(p))
29	  }
30	}
31	
32	object L1DCacheBank {
33	  def apply(p: Parameters): L1DCacheBank = {
34	    return Module(new L1DCacheBank(p))
35	  }
36	}
37	
38	class L1DCache(p: Parameters) extends Module {
39	  val io = IO(new Bundle {
40	    val dbus = Flipped(new DBusIO(p))
41	    val axi = new AxiMasterIO(p.axi1AddrBits, p.axi1DataBits, p.axi1IdBits)
42	    val flush = Flipped(new DFlushIO(p))
43	    val volt_sel = Input(Bool())
44	  })
45	  io.axi.defaults()
46	
47	  assert(p.axi1IdBits == 4)
48	  assert(p.axi1DataBits == 256 || p.axi1DataBits == 128)
49	
50	  val bank0 = Module(new L1DCacheBank(p))
51	  val bank1 = Module(new L1DCacheBank(p))
52	
53	  val linebit = log2Ceil(p.lsuDataBits / 8)
54	  val linebytes = 1 << linebit
55	
56	  // Remove bank select bit from address.
57	  def BankInAddress(addr: UInt): UInt = {
58	    assert(addr.getWidth == p.lsuAddrBits)
59	    val output = Cat(addr(p.lsuAddrBits - 1, linebit + 1), addr(linebit - 1, 0))
60	    assert(output.getWidth == (p.lsuAddrBits - 1))
61	    output
62	  }
63	
64	  // Add bank select bit to address.
65	  def BankOutAddress(addr: UInt, bank: Int): UInt = {
66	    assert(addr.getWidth == (p.axi1AddrBits - 1))
67	    val output = Cat(addr(p.axi1AddrBits - 2, linebit), bank.U(1.W), addr(linebit - 1, 0))
68	    assert(output.getWidth == p.axi1AddrBits)
69	    output
70	  }
71	
72	  assert(io.dbus.size <= linebytes.U)
73	
74	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
75	  // Data bus multiplexor.
76	  val lineend = (io.dbus.addr(linebit - 1, 0) + io.dbus.size) > linebytes.U
77	  val dempty = io.dbus.size === 0.U
78	  val dsel0 = io.dbus.addr(linebit) === 0.U && !dempty || lineend
79	  val dsel1 = io.dbus.addr(linebit) === 1.U && !dempty || lineend
80	  val preread = ~io.dbus.addr(11, linebit) =/= 0.U && !io.dbus.write && !dempty  // Within 4KB
81	  val addrA = Mux(io.dbus.addr(linebit), BankInAddress(io.dbus.adrx), BankInAddress(io.dbus.addr))
82	  val addrB = Mux(io.dbus.addr(linebit), BankInAddress(io.dbus.addr), BankInAddress(io.dbus.adrx))
83	  val rsel = Reg(Vec(linebytes, Bool()))
84	
85	  assert(!(io.dbus.valid && io.dbus.adrx =/= (io.dbus.addr + linebytes.U)))
86	
87	  // Write masks
88	  val wmaskSA = ((~0.U(linebytes.W)) << io.dbus.addr(linebit - 1, 0))(linebytes - 1, 0)
89	  val wmaskSB = ((~0.U(linebytes.W)) >> (linebytes.U - io.dbus.addr(linebit - 1, 0)))(linebytes - 1, 0)
90	  val wmaskA = io.dbus.wmask & wmaskSA
91	  val wmaskB = io.dbus.wmask & wmaskSB
92	  assert(wmaskSA.getWidth == io.dbus.wmask.getWidth)
93	  assert(wmaskSB.getWidth == io.dbus.wmask.getWidth)
94	  assert(wmaskA.getWidth == io.dbus.wmask.getWidth)
95	  assert(wmaskB.getWidth == io.dbus.wmask.getWidth)
96	  assert((wmaskSA | wmaskSB) === ~0.U(linebytes.W))
97	  assert((wmaskSA & wmaskSB) === 0.U)
98	
99	  bank0.io.dbus.valid := io.dbus.valid && (dsel0 || preread)
100	  bank0.io.dbus.write := io.dbus.write
101	  bank0.io.dbus.wmask := Mux(io.dbus.addr(linebit), wmaskB, wmaskA)
102	  bank0.io.dbus.size  := io.dbus.size
103	  bank0.io.dbus.addr  := addrA
104	  bank0.io.dbus.adrx  := addrB
105	  bank0.io.dbus.wdata := io.dbus.wdata
106	  bank0.io.dbus.pc    := 0.U
107	
108	  bank1.io.dbus.valid := io.dbus.valid && (dsel1 || preread)
109	  bank1.io.dbus.write := io.dbus.write
110	  bank1.io.dbus.wmask := Mux(io.dbus.addr(linebit), wmaskA, wmaskB)
111	  bank1.io.dbus.size  := io.dbus.size
112	  bank1.io.dbus.addr  := addrB
113	  bank1.io.dbus.adrx  := addrA
114	  bank1.io.dbus.wdata := io.dbus.wdata
115	  bank1.io.dbus.pc    := 0.U
116	
117	  val dbusready = (bank0.io.dbus.ready || !dsel0) &&
118	                  (bank1.io.dbus.ready || !dsel1)
119	
120	  // Read bank selection.
121	  when (io.dbus.valid && dbusready && !io.dbus.write) {
122	    val addr = io.dbus.addr(linebit, 0)
123	    for (i <- 0 until linebytes) {
124	      // reverse order to index usage
125	      rsel(linebytes - 1 - i) := (addr + i.U)(linebit)
126	    }
127	  }
128	
129	  def RData(data: UInt = 0.U(1.W), i: Int = 0): UInt = {
130	    if (i < p.lsuDataBits / 8) {
131	      val d0 = bank0.io.dbus.rdata(8 * i + 7, 8 * i)
132	      val d1 = bank1.io.dbus.rdata(8 * i + 7, 8 * i)
133	      val d = Mux(rsel(i), d1, d0)
134	      val r = if (i == 0) d else Cat(d, data)
135	      assert(d.getWidth == 8)
136	      assert(r.getWidth == (i + 1) * 8)
137	      RData(r, i + 1)
138	    } else {
139	      data
140	    }
141	  }
142	
143	  io.dbus.rdata := RData()
144	
145	  io.dbus.ready := dbusready
146	
147	  // dbus transaction must latch until completion.
148	  val addrLatchActive = RegInit(false.B)
149	  val addrLatchData = Reg(UInt(p.lsuAddrBits.W))
150	
151	  when (io.dbus.valid && !io.dbus.ready && !addrLatchActive) {
152	    addrLatchActive := true.B
153	    addrLatchData := io.dbus.addr
154	  } .elsewhen (addrLatchActive && io.dbus.ready) {
155	    addrLatchActive := false.B
156	  }
157	
158	  // assert(!(addrLatchActive && !io.dbus.valid)) -- do not use, allow temporary deassertion
159	  assert(!(addrLatchActive && addrLatchData =/= io.dbus.addr))
160	
161	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
162	  // AXI read bus multiplexor.
163	  val rresp0 = io.axi.read.data.bits.id(p.axi1IdBits - 1) === 0.U
164	  val rresp1 = io.axi.read.data.bits.id(p.axi1IdBits - 1) === 1.U
165	
166	  val raxi0 = bank0.io.axi.read.addr.valid
167	  val raxi1 = !raxi0
168	
169	  io.axi.read.addr.valid     := bank0.io.axi.read.addr.valid || bank1.io.axi.read.addr.valid
170	  io.axi.read.addr.bits.addr := Mux(raxi0, BankOutAddress(bank0.io.axi.read.addr.bits.addr, 0),
171	                                           BankOutAddress(bank1.io.axi.read.addr.bits.addr, 1))
172	  io.axi.read.addr.bits.id   := Mux(raxi0, Cat(0.U(1.W), bank0.io.axi.read.addr.bits.id), Cat(1.U(1.W), bank1.io.axi.read.addr.bits.id))
173	  io.axi.read.addr.bits.prot := 2.U
174	
175	  bank0.io.axi.read.addr.ready := io.axi.read.addr.ready && raxi0
176	  bank1.io.axi.read.addr.ready := io.axi.read.addr.ready && raxi1
177	
178	  bank0.io.axi.read.data.valid := io.axi.read.data.valid && rresp0
179	  bank0.io.axi.read.data.bits := io.axi.read.data.bits
180	
181	  bank1.io.axi.read.data.valid := io.axi.read.data.valid && rresp1
182	  bank1.io.axi.read.data.bits := io.axi.read.data.bits
183	
184	  io.axi.read.data.ready := bank0.io.axi.read.data.ready && rresp0 ||
185	                            bank1.io.axi.read.data.ready && rresp1
186	
187	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
188	  // AXI write bus multiplexor.
189	  val waxi0 = Wire(Bool())
190	  val waxi1 = Wire(Bool())
191	  val wresp0 = io.axi.write.resp.bits.id(p.axi1IdBits - 1) === 0.U
192	  val wresp1 = io.axi.write.resp.bits.id(p.axi1IdBits - 1) === 1.U
193	
194	  if (true) {
195	    waxi0 := bank0.io.axi.write.addr.valid
196	    waxi1 := !waxi0
197	  } else {
198	    // Flushes interleave banks for whole line writes.
199	    // Change when selected bank not active and other is active.
200	    // Change on last transaction in a line write.
201	    val wsel = RegInit(false.B)
202	
203	    when (wsel) {
204	      when (bank0.io.axi.write.addr.valid && !bank1.io.axi.write.addr.valid) {
205	        wsel := false.B
206	      } .elsewhen (bank1.io.axi.write.addr.valid && bank1.io.axi.write.addr.ready && bank1.io.axi.write.addr.bits.id === ~0.U((p.axi1IdBits - 1).W)) {
207	        wsel := false.B
208	      }
209	    } .otherwise {
210	      when (bank1.io.axi.write.addr.valid && !bank0.io.axi.write.addr.valid) {
211	        wsel := true.B
212	      } .elsewhen (bank0.io.axi.write.addr.valid && bank0.io.axi.write.addr.ready && bank0.io.axi.write.addr.bits.id === ~0.U((p.axi1IdBits - 1).W)) {
213	        wsel := true.B
214	      }
215	    }
216	
217	    waxi0 := wsel === false.B
218	    waxi1 := wsel === true.B
219	  }
220	
221	  io.axi.write.addr.valid := bank0.io.axi.write.addr.valid && waxi0 ||
222	                             bank1.io.axi.write.addr.valid && waxi1
223	  io.axi.write.addr.bits.addr := Mux(waxi0, BankOutAddress(bank0.io.axi.write.addr.bits.addr, 0),
224	                                            BankOutAddress(bank1.io.axi.write.addr.bits.addr, 1))
225	  io.axi.write.addr.bits.id := Mux(waxi0, Cat(0.U(1.W), bank0.io.axi.write.addr.bits.id),
226	                                          Cat(1.U(1.W), bank1.io.axi.write.addr.bits.id))
227	  io.axi.write.addr.bits.prot := 2.U
228	
229	  io.axi.write.data.valid := bank0.io.axi.write.data.valid && waxi0 ||
230	                             bank1.io.axi.write.data.valid && waxi1
231	  io.axi.write.data.bits := Mux(waxi0, bank0.io.axi.write.data.bits, bank1.io.axi.write.data.bits)
232	
233	  bank0.io.axi.write.addr.ready := io.axi.write.addr.ready && waxi0
234	  bank1.io.axi.write.addr.ready := io.axi.write.addr.ready && waxi1
235	  bank0.io.axi.write.data.ready := io.axi.write.data.ready && waxi0
236	  bank1.io.axi.write.data.ready := io.axi.write.data.ready && waxi1
237	
238	  bank0.io.axi.write.resp.valid := io.axi.write.resp.valid && wresp0
239	  bank0.io.axi.write.resp.bits  := io.axi.write.resp.bits
240	
241	  bank1.io.axi.write.resp.valid := io.axi.write.resp.valid && wresp1
242	  bank1.io.axi.write.resp.bits  := io.axi.write.resp.bits
243	
244	  io.axi.write.resp.ready := bank0.io.axi.write.resp.ready && wresp0 ||
245	                             bank1.io.axi.write.resp.ready && wresp1
246	
247	  assert(!(io.axi.write.addr.valid && !io.axi.write.data.valid))
248	  assert(!(io.axi.write.addr.valid && (io.axi.write.addr.ready =/= io.axi.write.data.ready)))
249	
250	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
251	  // Flush controls.
252	  // bank0.io.flush.valid := io.flush.valid && bank1.io.flush.ready
253	  // bank1.io.flush.valid := io.flush.valid && bank0.io.flush.ready
254	  bank0.io.flush.valid := io.flush.valid
255	  bank0.io.flush.all   := io.flush.all
256	  bank0.io.flush.clean := io.flush.clean
257	
258	  bank1.io.flush.valid := io.flush.valid
259	  bank1.io.flush.all   := io.flush.all
260	  bank1.io.flush.clean := io.flush.clean
261	
262	  io.flush.ready := bank0.io.flush.ready && bank1.io.flush.ready
263	
264	  // Voltage Selection
265	  bank0.io.volt_sel    := io.volt_sel
266	  bank1.io.volt_sel    := io.volt_sel
267	}
268	
269	class L1DCacheBank(p: Parameters) extends Module {
270	  // A relatively simple cache block. Only one transaction may post at a time.
271	  // 2^8 * 256  / 8 = 8KiB    4-way  Tag[31,12] + Index[11,6] + Data[5,0]
272	  val slots = p.l1dslots
273	  val slotBits = log2Ceil(slots)
274	  val assoc = p.l1dassoc
275	  val sets = slots / assoc
276	  val setLsb = log2Ceil(p.lsuDataBits / 8)
277	  val setMsb = log2Ceil(sets) + setLsb - 1
278	  val tagLsb = setMsb + 1
279	  val tagMsb = p.axi1AddrBits - 2
280	
281	  val io = IO(new Bundle {
282	    val dbus = Flipped(new DBusIO(p, true))
283	    val axi = new AxiMasterIO(p.axi1AddrBits - 1, p.axi1DataBits, p.axi1IdBits - 1)
284	    val flush = Flipped(new DFlushIO(p))
285	    val volt_sel = Input(Bool())
286	  })
287	  io.axi.defaults()
288	
289	  // AXI memory consistency, maintain per-byte strobes.
290	  val bytes = p.lsuDataBits / 8
291	
292	  def Mem8to9(d: UInt, m: UInt): UInt = {
293	    assert(d.getWidth == 256)
294	    assert(m.getWidth == 256 / 8)
295	    val data = Wire(Vec(bytes, UInt(9.W)))
296	    for (i <- 0 until bytes) {
297	      data(i) := Cat(m(i), d(7 + i * 8, 0 + i * 8))
298	    }
299	    data.asUInt
300	  }
301	
302	  def Mem9to8(d: UInt): UInt = {
303	    assert(d.getWidth == 256 * 9 / 8)
304	    val data = Wire(Vec(bytes, UInt(8.W)))
305	    for (i <- 0 until bytes) {
306	      data(i) := d(7 + i * 9, 0 + i * 9)
307	    }
308	    data.asUInt
309	  }
310	
311	  def Mem9to1(d: UInt): UInt = {
312	    assert(d.getWidth == 256 * 9 / 8)
313	    val data = Wire(Vec(bytes, UInt(1.W)))
314	    for (i <- 0 until bytes) {
315	      data(i) := Cat(d(8 + i * 9))
316	    }
317	    data.asUInt
318	  }
319	
320	  val checkBit = if (p.lsuDataBits == 128) 4
321	                 else if (p.lsuDataBits == 256) 5 else 6
322	  assert(assoc == 2 ||  assoc == 4 || assoc == 8 || assoc == 16 || assoc == slots)
323	  assert(assoc != 2 ||  setLsb == checkBit && setMsb == (checkBit + 6) && tagLsb == (checkBit + 7))
324	  assert(assoc != 4 ||  setLsb == checkBit && setMsb == (checkBit + 5) && tagLsb == (checkBit + 6))
325	  assert(assoc != 8 ||  setLsb == checkBit && setMsb == (checkBit + 4) && tagLsb == (checkBit + 5))
326	  assert(assoc != 16 || setLsb == checkBit && setMsb == (checkBit + 3) && tagLsb == (checkBit + 4))
327	  assert(assoc != slots || tagLsb == checkBit)
328	
329	  class Sram_1rwm_256x288 extends BlackBox {
330	    val io = IO(new Bundle {
331	      val clock     = Input(Clock())
332	      val valid     = Input(Bool())
333	      val write     = Input(Bool())
334	      val addr      = Input(UInt(slotBits.W))
335	      val wdata     = Input(UInt((256 * 9 / 8).W))
336	      val wmask     = Input(UInt((256 * 1 / 8).W))
337	      val rdata     = Output(UInt((256 * 9 / 8).W))
338	      val volt_sel  = Input(Bool())
339	    })
340	  }
341	
342	  // Check io.dbus.wmask is in range of addr and size.
343	  val busbytes = p.lsuDataBits / 8
344	  val linemsb = log2Ceil(busbytes)
345	  val chkmask0 = (~0.U(busbytes.W)) >> (busbytes.U - io.dbus.size)
346	  val chkmask1 = Cat(chkmask0, chkmask0) << io.dbus.addr(linemsb - 1, 0)
347	  val chkmask = chkmask1(2 * busbytes - 1, busbytes)
348	  assert(!(io.dbus.valid && io.dbus.write) || (io.dbus.wmask & ~chkmask) === 0.U)
349	
350	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
351	  // CAM state.
352	  val valid = RegInit(VecInit(Seq.fill(slots)(false.B)))
353	  val dirty = RegInit(VecInit(Seq.fill(slots)(false.B)))
354	  val camaddr = Reg(Vec(slots, UInt((p.lsuAddrBits - 1).W)))
355	  val mem = Module(new Sram_1rwm_256x288())
356	
357	  val history = Reg(Vec(slots / assoc, Vec(assoc, UInt(log2Ceil(assoc).W))))
358	
359	  val matchSet = Wire(Vec(slots, Bool()))
360	  val matchAddr = Wire(Vec(assoc, Bool()))
361	
362	  val matchSlotB = Wire(Vec(slots, Bool()))
363	  val matchSlot = matchSlotB.asUInt
364	  val replaceSlotB = Wire(Vec(slots, Bool()))
365	  val replaceSlot = replaceSlotB.asUInt
366	
367	  // OR mux lookup of associative entries.
368	  def camaddrRead(i: Int, value: UInt = 0.U(32.W)): UInt = {
369	    if (i < slots) {
370	      camaddrRead(i + assoc, value | MuxOR(matchSet(i), camaddr(i)))
371	    } else {
372	      value
373	    }
374	  }
375	
376	  for (i <- 0 until assoc) {
377	    val ca = camaddrRead(i)
378	    matchAddr(i) := io.dbus.addr(tagMsb, tagLsb) === ca(tagMsb, tagLsb)
379	  }
380	
381	  for (i <- 0 until slots) {
382	    val set = i / assoc
383	    val setMatch = if (assoc == slots) true.B else io.dbus.addr(setMsb, setLsb) === set.U
384	    matchSet(i) := setMatch
385	  }
386	
387	  for (i <- 0 until slots) {
388	    val set = i / assoc
389	    val index = i % assoc
390	
391	    matchSlotB(i) := valid(i) && matchSet(i) && matchAddr(index)
392	
393	    val historyMatch = history(set)(index) === 0.U
394	    replaceSlotB(i) := matchSet(i) && historyMatch
395	    assert((i - set * assoc) == index)
396	  }
397	
398	  assert(PopCount(matchSlot) <= 1.U)
399	  assert(PopCount(replaceSlot) <= 1.U)
400	
401	  val found = matchSlot =/= 0.U
402	
403	  val replaceNum = Wire(Vec(slots, UInt(slotBits.W)))
404	  for (i <- 0 until slots) {
405	    replaceNum(i) := MuxOR(replaceSlot(i), i.U)
406	  }
407	
408	  val replaceId = VecOR(replaceNum, slots)
409	  assert(replaceId.getWidth == slotBits)
410	
411	  val readNum = Wire(Vec(slots, UInt(slotBits.W)))
412	  for (i <- 0 until slots) {
413	    readNum(i) := MuxOR(matchSlotB(i), i.U)
414	  }
415	  val foundId = VecOR(readNum, slots)
416	
417	  for (i <- 0 until slots / assoc) {
418	    // Get the matched value from the OneHot encoding of the set.
419	    val matchSet = matchSlot((i + 1) * assoc - 1, i * assoc)
420	    assert(PopCount(matchSet) <= 1.U)
421	    val matchIndices = Wire(Vec(assoc, UInt(log2Ceil(assoc).W)))
422	    for (j <- 0 until assoc) {
423	      matchIndices(j) := MuxOR(matchSet(j), j.U)
424	    }
425	    val matchIndex = VecOR(matchIndices, assoc)
426	    assert(matchIndex.getWidth == log2Ceil(assoc))
427	    val matchValue = history(i)(matchIndex)
428	
429	    // History based on count values so that high set size has less DFF usage.
430	    when (io.dbus.valid && io.dbus.ready && (if (assoc == slots) true.B else io.dbus.addr(setMsb, setLsb) === i.U)) {
431	      for (j <- 0 until assoc) {
432	        when (matchSet(j)) {
433	          history(i)(j) := (assoc - 1).U
434	        } .elsewhen (history(i)(j) > matchValue) {
435	          history(i)(j) := history(i)(j) - 1.U
436	          assert(history(i)(j) > 0.U)
437	        }
438	      }
439	    }
440	  }
441	
442	  // Reset history to unique values within sets.
443	  // Must be placed below all other assignments.
444	  // Note the definition is Reg() so will generate an asynchronous reset.
445	  when (reset.asBool) {
446	    for (i <- 0 until slots / assoc) {
447	      for (j <- 0 until assoc) {
448	        history(i)(j) := j.U
449	      }
450	    }
451	  }
452	
453	  // These checks are extremely slow to compile.
454	  if (false) {
455	    for (i <- 0 until slots / assoc) {
456	      for (j <- 0 until assoc) {
457	        for (k <- 0 until assoc) {
458	          if (j != k) {
459	            assert(history(i)(j) =/= history(i)(k))
460	          }
461	        }
462	      }
463	    }
464	  }
465	
466	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
467	  // Flush interface.
468	  object FlushState extends ChiselEnum {
469	    val sNone, sCapture, sProcess, sMemwaddr, sMemwdata, sAxiready, sAxiresp, sEnd = Value
470	  }
471	
472	  val fstate = RegInit(FlushState.sNone)
473	  val flush = RegInit(VecInit(Seq.fill(slots)(false.B)))
474	
475	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
476	  // AXI interface.
477	  val ractive = RegInit(false.B)
478	  val wactive = RegInit(false.B)
479	  val active = ractive || wactive
480	
481	  assert(!(ractive && fstate =/= FlushState.sNone))
482	
483	  val axiraddrvalid = RegInit(false.B)
484	  val axirdataready = RegInit(false.B)
485	
486	  val memwaddrEn = RegInit(false.B)
487	  val memwdataEn = RegInit(false.B)
488	  val axiwaddrvalid = RegInit(false.B)
489	  val axiwdatavalid = RegInit(false.B)
490	  val axiwdatabuf = Reg(UInt(p.axi1DataBits.W))
491	  val axiwstrbbuf = Reg(UInt((p.axi1DataBits / 8).W))
492	
493	  val axiraddr = Reg(UInt((p.axi1AddrBits - 1).W))
494	  val axiwaddr = Reg(UInt((p.axi1AddrBits - 1).W))
495	
496	  val replaceIdReg = Reg(UInt(slotBits.W))
497	
498	  val alignedAddr = Cat(io.dbus.addr(tagMsb, setLsb), 0.U(setLsb.W))
499	
500	  when (io.dbus.valid && !io.dbus.ready && !active) {
501	    ractive := true.B
502	    wactive := dirty(replaceId)
503	    assert(!(dirty(replaceId) && !valid(replaceId)))
504	    axiraddrvalid := true.B
505	    axirdataready := true.B
506	    valid(replaceId) := false.B
507	    dirty(replaceId) := false.B
508	    replaceIdReg := replaceId
509	    camaddr(replaceId) := alignedAddr
510	    axiraddr := alignedAddr
511	    axiwaddr := camaddr(replaceId)
512	  }
513	
514	  // Writeback pulsed controls to memory.
515	  memwaddrEn := io.dbus.valid && !io.dbus.ready && !active && dirty(replaceId)
516	  memwdataEn := memwaddrEn
517	
518	  when (io.dbus.valid && io.dbus.ready && io.dbus.write) {
519	    dirty(foundId) := true.B
520	  }
521	
522	  when (io.axi.read.addr.valid && io.axi.read.addr.ready) {
523	    axiraddrvalid := false.B
524	  }
525	
526	  when (io.axi.read.data.valid && io.axi.read.data.ready) {
527	    valid(replaceIdReg) := true.B
528	    axirdataready := false.B
529	    ractive := false.B
530	  }
531	
532	  when (memwdataEn) {
533	    val rdata = mem.io.rdata
534	    axiwdatabuf := Mem9to8(rdata)
535	    axiwstrbbuf := Mem9to1(rdata)
536	    axiwaddrvalid := true.B
537	    axiwdatavalid := true.B
538	  }
539	
540	  when (io.axi.write.addr.valid && io.axi.write.addr.ready) {
541	    axiwaddrvalid := false.B
542	  }
543	
544	  when (io.axi.write.data.valid && io.axi.write.data.ready) {
545	    axiwdatavalid := false.B
546	  }
547	
548	  when (io.axi.write.resp.valid && io.axi.write.resp.ready) {
549	    wactive := false.B
550	  }
551	
552	  io.axi.read.addr.valid := axiraddrvalid
553	  io.axi.read.addr.bits.addr := axiraddr
554	  io.axi.read.addr.bits.id := 0.U
555	  io.axi.read.addr.bits.prot := 2.U
556	  io.axi.read.data.ready := axirdataready
557	  assert(!(io.axi.read.data.valid && !io.axi.read.data.ready))
558	
559	  io.axi.write.addr.valid     := axiwaddrvalid
560	  io.axi.write.addr.bits.id   := 0.U
561	  io.axi.write.addr.bits.prot   := 2.U
562	  io.axi.write.addr.bits.addr := axiwaddr
563	
564	  io.axi.write.resp.ready     := true.B
565	
566	  io.axi.write.data.valid     := axiwdatavalid
567	  io.axi.write.data.bits.last := true.B
568	  io.axi.write.data.bits.data := axiwdatabuf.asUInt
569	  io.axi.write.data.bits.strb := axiwstrbbuf.asUInt
570	
571	  assert(!(io.axi.read.addr.valid && !ractive))
572	  assert(!(io.axi.read.data.ready && !ractive))
573	  assert(!(io.axi.write.addr.valid && !wactive && fstate === FlushState.sNone))
574	
575	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
576	  // Axi Write Response Count.
577	  val wrespcnt = RegInit(0.U((slotBits + 1).W))
578	  val wrespinc = io.axi.write.addr.valid && io.axi.write.addr.ready
579	  val wrespdec = io.axi.write.resp.valid && io.axi.write.resp.ready
580	
581	  when (wrespinc && !wrespdec) {
582	    wrespcnt := wrespcnt + 1.U
583	  } .elsewhen (!wrespinc && wrespdec) {
584	    wrespcnt := wrespcnt - 1.U
585	  }
586	
587	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
588	  // Flush interface.
589	  val flushId = Ctz(flush.asUInt)(slotBits - 1, 0)
590	
591	  for (i <- 0 until slots) {
592	    assert(!(flush(i) && !dirty(i)))
593	  }
594	
595	  switch(fstate) {
596	    is (FlushState.sNone) {
597	      when (io.flush.valid && !axiwaddrvalid && !axiwdatavalid && !axiraddrvalid && !axirdataready) {
598	        fstate := FlushState.sCapture
599	        replaceIdReg := foundId
600	      }
601	    }
602	
603	    is (FlushState.sCapture) {
604	      fstate := FlushState.sProcess
605	      flush(replaceIdReg) := dirty(replaceIdReg)  // matched (without .all)
606	      when (io.flush.all) {
607	        for (i <- 0 until slots) {
608	          flush(i) := dirty(i)
609	        }
610	      }
611	    }
612	
613	    is (FlushState.sProcess) {
614	      when (flush.asUInt === 0.U) {
615	        fstate := FlushState.sAxiresp
616	      } .otherwise {
617	        fstate := FlushState.sMemwaddr
618	        memwaddrEn := true.B
619	      }
620	      replaceIdReg := flushId
621	    }
622	
623	    is (FlushState.sMemwaddr) {
624	      assert(memwaddrEn)
625	      fstate := FlushState.sMemwdata
626	      axiwaddr := camaddr(replaceIdReg)
627	      flush(replaceIdReg) := false.B
628	      dirty(replaceIdReg) := false.B
629	      when (io.flush.clean) {
630	        valid(replaceIdReg) := false.B
631	      }
632	    }
633	
634	    is (FlushState.sMemwdata) {
635	      assert(memwdataEn)
636	      fstate := FlushState.sAxiready
637	    }
638	
639	    is (FlushState.sAxiready) {
640	      when ((!axiwaddrvalid || io.axi.write.addr.valid && io.axi.write.addr.ready) &&
641	            (!axiwdatavalid || io.axi.write.data.valid && io.axi.write.data.ready)) {
642	        fstate := FlushState.sProcess
643	      }
644	    }
645	
646	    is (FlushState.sAxiresp) {
647	      when (wrespcnt === 0.U) {
648	        fstate := FlushState.sEnd
649	      }
650	    }
651	
652	    is (FlushState.sEnd) {
653	      // Must complete the handshake as there are multiple banks.
654	      when (io.flush.ready && !io.flush.valid) {
655	        fstate := FlushState.sNone
656	      }
657	      when (io.flush.clean) {
658	        when (io.flush.all) {
659	          for (i <- 0 until slots) {
660	            valid(i) := false.B
661	            assert(!dirty(i))
662	            assert(!flush(i))
663	          }
664	        }
665	      }
666	    }
667	  }
668	
669	  io.flush.ready := fstate === FlushState.sEnd
670	
671	  assert(!(io.flush.valid && io.dbus.valid))
672	
673	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
674	  // Core Data Bus.
675	  io.dbus.ready := found && !ractive
676	  io.dbus.rdata := Mem9to8(mem.io.rdata)
677	  assert(!(io.dbus.valid && io.dbus.size === 0.U))
678	
679	  // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
680	  // Memory controls.
681	  val axiwrite  = memwaddrEn
682	  val axiread = io.axi.read.data.valid && io.axi.read.data.ready
683	  val buswrite = io.dbus.valid && io.dbus.ready && io.dbus.write
684	  val busread  = io.dbus.valid && !io.dbus.write && !ractive
685	
686	  val wdbits = p.axi1DataBits
687	  val wmbits = p.axi1DataBits / 8
688	  val id = io.axi.read.data.bits.id
689	  val rsel = axirdataready
690	
691	  mem.io.clock    := clock
692	  mem.io.valid    := busread || buswrite || axiread || axiwrite
693	  mem.io.write    := rsel && !axiwrite || io.dbus.valid && io.dbus.write && !ractive
694	  mem.io.addr     := Mux(rsel || axiwrite, replaceIdReg, foundId)
695	  mem.io.wmask    := Mux(rsel, ~0.U(wmbits.W), io.dbus.wmask)
696	  mem.io.wdata    :=
697	    Mux(rsel,
698	      Mem8to9(
699	        Cat(0.U((256 - io.axi.read.data.bits.data.getWidth).W), io.axi.read.data.bits.data),
700	        Cat(0.U((32 - wmbits).W), 0.U(wmbits.W))),
701	      Mem8to9(
702	        Cat(0.U((256 - io.dbus.wdata.getWidth).W), io.dbus.wdata),
703	        Cat(0.U((32 - wmbits).W), ~0.U(wmbits.W))))
704	  mem.io.volt_sel := io.volt_sel
705	
706	
707	  assert(PopCount(busread +& buswrite +& axiread) <= 1.U)
708	}
709	
710	@nowarn
711	object EmitL1DCache extends App {
712	  val p = new Parameters
713	  (new ChiselStage).execute(
714	    Array("--target", "systemverilog") ++ args,
715	    Seq(ChiselGeneratorAnnotation(() => new L1DCache(p))) ++ Seq(FirtoolOption("-enable-layers=Verification"))
716	  )
717	}
718	
719	@nowarn
720	object EmitL1DCacheBank extends App {
721	  val p = new Parameters
722	  (new ChiselStage).execute(
723	    Array("--target", "systemverilog") ++ args,
724	    Seq(ChiselGeneratorAnnotation(() => new L1DCacheBank(p))) ++ Seq(FirtoolOption("-enable-layers=Verification"))
725	  )
726	}

79	  // enableVerification, as debug ports are only needed for verification.
80	  // However, coupling them is not trivial because enableVerification also
81	  // enables the full Retirement Buffer (ROB) tracking mode (mini = false).
82	  // Under configurations with RVV disabled but Float enabled (like core_mini_axi_sim),
83	  // the full ROB mode has hardware bugs/hangs (e.g. vector store waits and reset
84	  // oscillations). We still need the debug ports exposed for these targets to
85	  // generate instruction traces for riscv-dv co-simulation, but we must run
86	  // the ROB in mini mode (enableVerification = false) to avoid the hangs.
87	  // Thus, we keep these parameters decoupled.
88	  // Expose the debug/trace ports at the module boundary.
89	  var exposeDebugPorts = false
90

92	  def shouldExposeDebugPorts: Boolean = { exposeDebugPorts || enableVerification }
93	
94	  // Enable RVV. This conforms to the RVV1.0 specification.

98	
99	  def useRetirementBuffer: Boolean = { enableVerification }
100	
101	  // Scalar Floating point
102	  var enableFloat = false
103	  var enableZfbfmin = false
104	  var enableVectorBf16 = false
105	  // Use the Div/Sqrt module from PULP instead of E906.
106	  // It is smaller, but has small rounding errors.
107	  val floatPulpDivsqrt = 0
108	
109	  val scalarRegCount = 32
110	  val scalarRegCountWidth = log2Ceil(scalarRegCount)
111	  val floatRegCount = 32
112	  val floatRegfileBaseAddr = 32
113	  val floatRegCountWidth = log2Ceil(floatRegCount)
114	  val rvvRegfileBaseAddr = 64
115	  val rvvRegCount = 32
116	  val rvvRegCountWidth = log2Ceil(rvvRegCount)
117	  val retirementBufferSize = 8
118	  def retirementBufferIdxWidth: Int = {
119	    val activeFloatRegCount = (if (enableFloat) { floatRegCount } else { 0 })
120	    // +2 is for the "no write" and "store" dummy registers.

122	  }
123	
124	  // L0ICache Fetch unit.
125	  var enableFetchL0 = true
126	  val fetchCacheBytes = 1024

129	  val fetchAddrBits = programCounterBits   // do not change
130	  var fetchDataBits = 256  // do not change
131	  def fetchInstrSlots: Int = {
132	    assert(fetchDataBits % 32 == 0)
133	    assert(instructionBits % 32 == 0)
134	    assert(fetchDataBits % instructionBits == 0)
135	    fetchDataBits / instructionBits
136	  }
137

139	  val lsuAddrBits = programCounterBits  // do not change
140	  var lsuDataBits = 256
141	  def lsuDataBytes: Int = { lsuDataBits / 8 }
142	  val lsuDelayPipelineLen = 1
143	  def dbusSize: Int = { log2Ceil(lsuDataBits / 8) + 1 }
144	
145	  // TCM Size Configuration

147	  var dtcmSizeKBytes = Parameters.dtcmSizeKBytesDefault
148

151	  val l1iassoc = 4
152	  val axi0IdBits = 4  // (1x banks, 4 bits unused)
153	  val axi0AddrBits = 32
154	  def axi0DataBits: Int = { fetchDataBits }
155

158	  val l1dassoc = 4
159	  val axi1IdBits = 4  // (x2 banks, 3 bits unused)
160	  val axi1AddrBits = 32

162	
163	  // [Internal] TCM[Vector,Scalar] interface.
164	  var axi2IdBits = 6
165	  val axi2AddrBits = 32
166	  def axi2DataBits: Int = { lsuDataBits } // vectorBits
167	  def axi2DataBytes: Int = { axi2DataBits / 8 }
168	
169	  // If set, itcmMemoryFile should contain a path to a Verilog mem file.
170	  // NB: Only used by CoreAxi

172	
173	  val csrInCount = 13
174	  val csrOutCount = 9

178	object EmitParametersHeader {
179	  def apply(p: Parameters): String = {
180	    val mirror = ru.runtimeMirror(ru.getClass.getClassLoader)
181	    val instanceMirror = mirror.reflect(p)
182	    val symbol = instanceMirror.symbol
183	    val typeSym = symbol.toType
184	    val fields = typeSym.decls.collect {
185	      case t: (ru.TermSymbol @unchecked) if t.isVal || t.isVar => t
186	    }
187	
188	    var builder = new StringBuilder()
189	    builder = builder.append("#ifndef CORALNPU_PARAMETERS_H_\n")
190	    builder = builder.append("#define CORALNPU_PARAMETERS_H_\n")
191	    builder = builder.append("\n")
192	    builder = builder.append("#include <stdbool.h>\n")
193	    builder = builder.append("\n")
194	    fields.foreach { x =>
195	      val fieldMirror = instanceMirror.reflectField(x.asTerm)
196	      val fieldType = x.asTerm.typeSignature
197	      val value = fieldMirror.get
198	      val ctype = fieldType match {
199	        case t if t =:= ru.typeOf[Int] => Some("int")
200	        case t if t =:= ru.typeOf[Boolean] => Some("bool")
201	        case _ => None
202	      }
203	      if (ctype != None) {
204	        builder = builder.append(s"#define KP_${x.name} ${value}\n")
205	      }
206	    }
207	    // TODO(atv): See if we can improve the reflection above to execute
208	    // the methods for our dynamic parameters.
209	    builder = builder.append(s"#define KP_dbusSize ${p.dbusSize}\n")
210	    builder = builder.append(s"#define KP_useRetirementBuffer ${p.useRetirementBuffer}\n")
211	    builder = builder.append(s"#define KP_retirementBufferIdxWidth ${p.retirementBufferIdxWidth}\n")
212	    builder = builder.append(s"#define KP_exposeDebugPorts ${p.shouldExposeDebugPorts}\n")
213	    builder = builder.append("#endif\n")
214	    builder.result()
215	  }
216	}

content.thinking:
Now I have confirmed key facts:
- Production SoC (and all `flags.bzl`, `prod/BUILD`, etc.) sets `enableFetchL0=False`, `fetchDataBits=128`, `lsuDataBits=128`. So the L1ICache and L1DCache are used with 128-bit data width in production.

Wait — but `enableFetchL0=False` means the Fetch unit is `UncachedFetch`, not the `Fetch` with L0 cache. The L0 cache (`fetchCacheBytes = 1024`) is a different thing from L1ICache. Let me be careful here.

Actually, let me reconsider. There are TWO instruction cache concepts:
1. **L0ICache** (`enableFetchL0`, `fetchCacheBytes = 1024`): This is a 1KB micro-cache inside the `Fetch` unit (the `Fetch.scala`). When `enableFetchL0=True` (bare core default), the `Fetch` module includes this 1KB L0 cache. When `False` (production SoC), it uses `UncachedFetch` (no L0).
2. **L1ICache** (`L1ICache.scala`): This is a separate 8KB 4-way cache that sits between the fetch unit's `ibus` and AXI. 

So even in production SoC with `UncachedFetch`, the `L1ICache` can still be present. Let me check where L1ICache is instantiated. It's in Core.scala probably. Let me look at Core.scala to see how L1ICache and L1DCache are wired relative to Fetch/Lsu and the AXI ports.

Let me look at Core.scala around the cache instantiation, and the flush logic in Lsu.scala (the `lsu.io.flush` with fencei).

Important correction to the topic: 
- The "L1I 8KB/256b block" - actually the block/line is `fetchDataBits` wide = 256 bits in default, 128 in production. Each slot stores 256 bits (the SRAM is `Sram_1rw_256x256` = 256 entries × 256 bits). So a "line" / cache block is 256 bits = 32 bytes. With 256 slots that's 256 × 32 = 8192 = 8KB. 4-way → 64 sets.
- "L1D 双 bank(各 8KB)" - each bank is 256 slots × 256 bits = 8KB. Two banks → 16KB. Correct.

Now, the topic says "下一行预取" (next-line prefetch). Let me verify whether there's actually next-line prefetch. Looking at the L1DCache code, I see:
- `addr` and `adrx`: the DBusIO has both. `adrx` seems to be the adjacent/next line address. In L1DCache, `val lineend = (io.dbus.addr(linebit - 1, 0) + io.dbus.size) > linebytes.U` — detects cross-line access. And `addrA`/`addrB` route addr/adrx to bank0/bank1. 
- `preread`: `val preread = ~io.dbus.addr(11, linebit) =/= 0.U && !io.dbus.write && !dempty // Within 4KB` — this enables pre-reading both banks when the address is within 4KB (not in TCM region presumably). Hmm, this is "preread" of the second bank for a cross-line read, not next-line prefetch.

Let me look at where `adrx` is generated in Lsu.scala to understand if it's next-line prefetch. Let me check Lsu.scala for adrx and flush.

Actually, the "下一行预取" claim in the topic might be a slight mischaracterization. Let me verify carefully by examining the Lsu and how adrx is set. The DBusIO.adrx is likely the "next sequential line" address for the dual-bank interleaved access pattern, enabling a single dbus transaction to span two banks (two lines). This is more about supporting wide/aligned accesses across banks than classical next-line prefetch.

Actually wait. Let me re-read. In L1DCache, the dual-bank design: bank0 holds even lines, bank1 holds odd lines (interleaved by `linebit`, the line-address bit). A single dbus access with `addr` and `adrx` (addr+linebytes, i.e., the adjacent line) can read from both banks simultaneously. This is for the ML outer-product engine which reads wide contiguous data. So `adrx = addr + linebytes` lets one request fetch two adjacent cache lines (one from each bank) in parallel → doubles bandwidth. That's the "为 ML 外积引擎提供一半内存带宽" (provides half the... wait, "一半内存带宽" means "half the memory bandwidth"? That's odd phrasing. Let me re-read the practice task).

Practice task says: "解释 L1D 双 bank 如何为 ML 外积引擎提供一半内存带宽". Hmm, "提供一半内存带宽" - "provide half the memory bandwidth". That doesn't quite make sense either. Maybe it means the dual-bank provides 2× the bandwidth (each bank provides one line per cycle, so combined they provide a full 2-line access), OR it's a translation issue. Actually I think it might mean: each bank provides half of a wide access, so together they provide the full wide access. Or "一半" might be a typo/misphrase for "双倍". 

I'll explain it accurately: the dual-bank interleaved design lets a single load access read two adjacent lines in parallel (one from each bank), doubling effective bandwidth for the contiguous wide reads the MAC engine needs. I won't fabricate the "half bandwidth" claim; I'll describe the actual mechanism.

Let me verify the `adrx` semantics by looking at Lsu.scala. Let me read the relevant parts of Lsu.scala (flush + adrx) and Core.scala (cache wiring).

This is actually a really important and honest narrative for the lecture:
1. CoralNPU's primary storage is TCM (ITCM/DTCM) — single-cycle, deterministic (covered in u6-l2).
2. For code/data that overflows TCM and lives in external (AXI) memory, CoralNPU provides optional L1I/L1D caches.

74:## Cache

76:Caches exists as a single layer between the core and the first level of shared

82:The L1Dcache sizing is towards the scalar core requirements to perform loop
83:management and address generation. The L1Dcache is 16KB (SIMD256b) with low set
84:associativity of 4-way. The L1Dcache is implemented with a dual bank
85:architecture where each bank is 8KB (similar to L1Icache). This property allows
86:for a degree of next line prefetch. The L1Dcache also serves as an alignment
87-buffer for the scalar and SIMD instructions to assist development and to
88:simplify software support. In an embedded setting, the L1Dcache provides half of
89-the memory bandwidth to the ML outer-product engine when only a single external
90:memory port is provided. Line and all entry flushing is supported where the core
91-stalls until completion to simplify the contract.

Now, replacement policy: both caches use a `history` counter-based pseudo-LRU. Each set has `assoc` counters, each holding a value in [0, assoc-1], all unique. The entry with history==0 is the replace victim. On a hit, the matched entry's counter is reset to assoc-1 (most-recently-used), and all others with counter > matched counter are decremented. This is a counter-based LRU approximation. I'll explain this.

The result is one-hot (`PopCount(matchSlot) <= 1`).

The OR-mux `camaddrRead` does a big OR reduction to read the matched tag — a way to read associative entries without a conventional mux tree.

Now the dual-bank / adrx mechanism for L1D:
- bank0 holds lines where address bit `linebit`=0, bank1 holds bit `linebit`=1 (interleaved by the line-address bit).
- `BankInAddress` removes bit `linebit` from the address → bank-internal address.
- A dbus request provides `addr` and `adrx` (= addr + linebytes, asserted). `lineend` detects if the access straddles two lines.
- `dsel0`/`dsel1` select which bank(s) to activate; `preread` activates the other bank for reads within 4KB region (prefetch-like).
- `addrA`/`addrB`: if addr's bank bit = 1, addr goes to bank1 and adrx to bank0, else vice versa. So both banks can be read in one cycle → 2 lines/cycle → that's the "next line prefetch" / dual-bank bandwidth.
- `RData` re-interleaves the bytes from the two banks according to `rsel`.

Write masks: `wmaskSA`/`wmaskSB` split the strobe across the two halves.

ECC: each bank SRAM is 288 bits (9 bits/byte: 8 data + 1 parity per byte). `Mem8to9`/`Mem9to8`/`Mem9to1` convert. The check bits per byte give single-bit-error detection. `checkBit` reflects the ECC overhead in addressing.

Writeback (L1DCacheBank): dirty bit tracked per slot. On a miss to a dirty victim, `wactive` is set; the old line is read from SRAM (`memwaddrEn`/`memwdataEn`), converted via Mem9to8, and written back via AXI write (`axiwaddrvalid`/`axiwdatavalid`, single-beat `last=true`), awaiting BRESP. Meanwhile the new line is refilled via AXI read. `ractive`/`wactive` serialize: "Only one transaction may post at a time."

Flush FSM (FlushState): 
- sNone: capture request (save foundId or, for all, the slot vector).
- sCapture: build `flush` vector = dirty slots (for all) or just the matched line (without all).
- sProcess: if flush vector empty → sAxiresp; else pick Ctz(flush) → sMemwaddr.
- sMemwaddr/sMemwdata: read dirty line from SRAM, set up AXI write addr; clear flush/dirty; if `clean`, invalidate valid.
- sAxiready: wait for AXI write addr+data accepted → back to sProcess (next dirty victim).
- sAxiresp: wait for all write responses (`wrespcnt==0`).
- sEnd: for clean+all, invalidate all slots; assert io.flush.ready; return to sNone when handshake completes.

`wrespcnt` tracks outstanding AXI writes (inc on addr accept, dec on bresp).

Flush contract: `assert(!(io.flush.valid && io.dbus.valid))` — no dbus access during flush. And io.flush.ready only in sEnd. The core (via LSU/SCore) stalls dispatch until flush.ready. This is the "core stalls until completion" contract from overview.md.

SCore routing (lines 104-114):
- `io.dflush.valid := lsu.io.flush.valid && !fencei` — FLUSHALL/FLUSHAT → D-cache flush.
- `io.iflush.valid := lsu.io.flush.valid && fencei` — FENCEI → I-cache invalidate + redirect.
- `lsu.io.flush.ready := Mux(fencei, fetch.iflush.ready, io.dflush.ready)` — LSU waits on whichever path.

Lsu FlushCmd (lines 822-836):
- `all := isOneOf(FENCEI, FLUSHALL)`, `fencei := op===FENCEI`, `pcNext := pc+4`.
- FLUSHAT: all=false → line-address flush (the dbus.addr gives the line).
- `io.flush.clean := true.B` always.

input.content:
# L1 指令/数据 Cache

## 1. 本讲目标

学完本讲后，你应该能够：

- 说清 CoralNPU 的 **L1 指令 Cache（L1I）** 的容量、相联度、行宽与地址划分（Tag/Index/Offset），并解释它如何用「CAM + 计数式伪 LRU」完成命中判定与替换。
- 说清 **L1 数据 Cache（L1D）** 的「双 bank、每 bank 8KB、4 路」结构，以及为什么双 bank 能在一次访问里同时读出相邻两行（被官方文档称为「next line prefetch」与「为 ML 外积引擎提供一半内存带宽」）。
- 复述 **D-cache 写回 + 脏行回收** 的状态机，以及 `fence.i` / `flushall` / `flushat` 三类刷写指令如何驱动 `IFlushIO`/`DFlushIO`，并理解「**刷写期间内核 stall 到完成**」这一契约。
- 读懂 `L1ICache.scala` 与 `L1DCache.scala` 两份 Chisel 源码，并能对照 `overview.md` 的 Cache 章节核对设计意图。

> ⚠️ 关于文档：本讲主题里的「microarch.md 的 Cache 章节」在实际仓库中**并不存在**。`doc/microarch/microarch.md` 只写了流水线与指令延迟表，没有 Cache 段落。Cache 的官方设计意图写在 [`doc/overview.md:74-91`](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/doc/overview.md#L74-L91)，本讲以此为准，并始终用源码核对。

## 2. 前置知识

在进入本讲前，请先建立几个直觉（这些在 u6-l2、u4-l2 已有铺垫，这里只做定位）。

**第一，CoralNPU 的主存储是 TCM，不是 Cache。** ITCM（8KB@`0x0`）放代码、DTCM（32KB@`0x10000`）放数据，都是单拍可访问、地址固定、无 tag 检查的「紧耦合存储」。run-to-completion 的 ML 负载追求**可预测的时序**，所以 TCM 才是主力（详见 u6-l2）。

**第二，Cache 是「溢出到外部存储时的开销配角」。** 官方原话是：

> Caches exists as a single layer between the core and the first level of shared SRAM. The L1 cache and scalar core frontend are an **overhead** to the rest of the backend compute pipeline and ideally are as small as possible.
> —— [overview.md:76-78](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/doc/overview.md#L76-L78)

也就是说：当程序/数据超过了 TCM 容量、必须放在外部 SRAM（经 AXI 访问）时，才需要 L1 Cache 来 amortize（摊薄）外部访问的高延迟。

**第三，先分清三个「I 侧缓存」概念，不要混淆：**

| 名称 | 位置 | 容量 | 是否在当前生产数据通路中 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| L0ICache | `Fetch` 取指单元内部 | 1KB（`fetchCacheBytes`） | 否（生产 `enableFetchL0=False`，走 `UncachedFetch`） |
| **L1ICache** | `Fetch.ibus` 与 AXI 之间的独立模块 | **8KB** | **否（见下方说明）** |
| ITCM | SoC fabric 中 | 8KB | 是（主存） |

**第四，一个必须先说清的事实（本讲的诚实声明）。** `L1ICache.scala`、`L1DCache.scala` 这两个模块在当前 HEAD 是**独立可发射（emittable）的 RTL 模块**：它们各自有 `EmitL1ICache`/`EmitL1DCache` App 对象和 BUILD 目标（`l1icache_cc_library`、`l1dcache_cc_library`、`l1dcachebank_cc_library`），可以单独生成 SystemVerilog；但**它们没有被任何顶层（Core / SCore / CoralNPUChiselSubsystem）实例化进数据通路**。可以在全树搜索 `new L1ICache` / `new L1DCache` 验证：唯一命中是它们自身的 `apply` 工厂方法（[L1ICache.scala:24-28](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L24-L28)、[L1DCache.scala:26-36](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L26-L36)）。

> 结论：本讲讲解的是「**Cache 硬件本身如何实现**」——这是两份源码的全部价值所在。它们是 CoralNPU 为「需要外部 cached 存储的配置」准备的、经过独立发射/验证的 IP 块。至于「刷写语义」这一节，我们会看到对应的 ISA 与 LSU/SCore 联动（`fence.i`/`flushall`/`flushat`）是**在线生效**的：它当前驱动的是取指单元的 `IFlushIO`，而 `L1ICache`/`L1DCache` 实现了同一套 flush 接口，作为 cached 数据通路的参考实现。

**术语速查：**

- **Cache 行（line/block）**：cache 与外部存储之间一次搬移的最小单位。L1I/L1D 的行宽都是 256 位（32 字节）。
- **组相联（set-associative）**：把所有 slot 分成若干「组」，一个地址只可能落在某一组里的某一路（way）。
- **CAM（Content-Addressable Memory）**：这里指「拿地址当 key，并行比较所有 slot 的 tag」的查找方式。
- **伪 LRU**：用计数器近似「最近最少使用」的替换策略。
- **脏位（dirty）**：一个 cache 行被写过、与外部存储不一致时置 1；替换/刷写前必须写回。
- **stall**：内核停拍等待某操作完成。

## 3. 本讲源码地图

| 文件 | 作用 |
| --- | --- |
| [doc/overview.md](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/doc/overview.md#L74-L91) | Cache 章节：L1I/L1D 的容量、相联度、双 bank、刷写契约的**设计意图**（不是 microarch.md） |
| [hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/Parameters.scala](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/Parameters.scala#L149-L161) | `l1islots`/`l1iassoc`/`l1dslots`/`l1dassoc` 与 AXI 接口位宽等 cache 参数 |
| [hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala) | L1 指令 Cache：只读、CAM 查找、计数式伪 LRU、AXI 读填充、整表刷写 |
| [hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala) | L1 数据 Cache：顶层 `L1DCache`（双 bank 仲裁/对齐）+ `L1DCacheBank`（单 bank 核心，含脏位/写回/刷写 FSM） |
| [hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala#L822-L836) | `FlushCmd`、`LsuOp.FENCEI/FLUSHALL/FLUSHAT`、cached 标量访存标志 `sldst` |
| [hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/SCore.scala](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/SCore.scala#L103-L114) | 把 LSU 的 flush 路由成 `dflush`（D 侧）或 `iflush`（I 侧 + 取指重定向） |
| [hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/BUILD](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/BUILD#L793-L821) | `l1icache_cc_library` 等独立发射目标，证明它们是独立 IP 块 |

---

## 4. 核心概念与源码讲解

### 4.1 L1 指令 Cache：组织、查找与缺失填充

#### 4.1.1 概念说明

L1 指令 Cache（L1I）解决的问题是：「**取指请求落在 ITCM 之外、需要去外部 SRAM 取时，如何用一块小 SRAM 把最近用过的指令行缓存起来，避免每次都走慢速 AXI**」。

它是一个**只读、写分配不需要（指令不会被改写）、单事务在途**的简单 cache。源码顶部注释直接写明了它的规格：

[L1ICache.scala:30-34](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L30-L34) —— 「一个相对简单的 cache 块，同时只允许一个在途事务；`2^8 × 256 / 8 = 8KiB`，4 路，Tag[31,11]+Index[10,5]+Data[4,0]」。这段注释对应默认的 `fetchDataBits=256` 配置。

容量推导（默认 256 位行宽）：

\[ \text{容量} = \text{slots} \times \text{行宽} = 256 \times 256\text{b} = 256 \times 32\text{B} = 8192\text{B} = 8\,\text{KiB} \]

地址被切成三段（`setLsb = log2(fetchDataBits/8) = 5`，`sets = slots/assoc = 64`）：

\[ \underbrace{\text{Tag}}_{21\text{b}}\,\underbrace{\text{Index}}_{6\text{b}}\,\underbrace{\text{Offset}}_{5\text{b}} \quad\Rightarrow\quad \text{Tag}[31{:}11]+\text{Index}[10{:}5]+\text{Offset}[4{:}0] \]

#### 4.1.2 核心流程

每个取指请求 `io.ibus.addr` 到来时：

1. **组选择**：用 Index 位算出地址属于哪一组（共 64 组）。
2. **tag 比较（CAM）**：在该组的 4 路（way）里并行比较 tag；`valid && setMatch && tagMatch` 三者皆真即命中。
3. **命中**：从 SRAM 读出该 slot 的 256 位行，返回给 `io.ibus.rdata`；同时更新该组的 history 计数器（命中路置为「最近使用」）。
4. **缺失**：因为「同时只允许一个在途事务」，cache 先锁存地址，选一个替换 slot（history 最小的路），把该 slot 的 `valid` 暂时清 0；发一次 AXI 读把整行搬进来，写进 SRAM，再把 `valid` 置 1；随后命中返回。
5. **替换策略**：组内每路一个唯一计数器，计数器为 0 的那一路是被替换者；命中路计数器重置为最大值，其余按大小递减——这是计数式伪 LRU。
6. **整表刷写**：`io.flush.valid`（`IFlushIO`）一来，所有 slot 的 `valid` 一拍清零，`ready` 立即拉高——I-cache 刷写是单拍失效，不需要写回（指令只读）。

#### 4.1.3 源码精读

**容量与地址划分参数**（从 `Parameters` 注入）：

[Parameters.scala:149-154](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/Parameters.scala#L149-L154)：`l1islots = 256`、`l1iassoc = 4`、`axi0IdBits = 4`、`axi0AddrBits = 32`、`axi0DataBits = fetchDataBits`。注意 `axi0DataBits` 绑死到 `fetchDataBits`：默认 256，生产配置降到 128（见 4.1.4）。

[L1ICache.scala:36-43](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L36-L43) 把这些常量算成位段边界：`sets = slots/assoc`、`setLsb/setMsb/tagLsb/tagMsb`。紧接着 [L1ICache.scala:55-60](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L55-L60) 的一串 `assert` 把「assoc 与位段边界必须自洽」这一不变量焊死——例如 4 路时要求 `setLsb==5 && setMsb==10 && tagLsb==11`（256 位行）或 `setLsb==4 && setMsb==9 && tagLsb==10`（128 位行）。这是核对容量的「真相源」。

**存储体与 CAM 状态**：

[L1ICache.scala:62-80](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L62-L80)：声明了 BlackBox `Sram_1rw_256x256`（256 项 × 256 位 = 8KB 的数据阵列），以及三组寄存器状态——`valid`（每 slot 一个有效位）、`camaddr`（每 slot 存的地址/tag）、`history`（每组的每路一个计数器）。注意 `mem` 是按 slot 编址（`addr` 是 slot 编号），而不是按字节地址——这是 CAM 风格 cache 的特征。

**命中判定与替换选择**：

[L1ICache.scala:99-119](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L99-L119) 是查找核心。对每一 slot `i`：`matchSlotB(i) := valid(i) && matchSet(i) && matchAddr(index)`，其中 `matchSet` 用 Index 判定是否同组、`matchAddr` 用 Tag 判定是否同地址。结果被断言为 one-hot（`PopCount(matchSlot) <= 1`）。替换则用 `history(set)(index) === 0` 选出被淘汰路。

**计数式伪 LRU 更新**：

[L1ICache.scala:140-163](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L140-L163)：命中时把命中路计数器置为 `(assoc-1)`（最「新」），其余计数器若大于命中路原值则递减。复位时每组初始化为 `0,1,...,assoc-1` 的唯一值（[L1ICache.scala:168-174](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L168-L174)），保证任何时候「计数器为 0 的路唯一」。

**AXI 读填充状态机**：

[L1ICache.scala:197-242](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L197-L242) 用两个寄存器 `axivalid`（AR 通道在途）和 `axiready`（R 通道等待中）串起一次缺失填充：

- 缺失且无在途事务 → 锁存替换 slot（`replaceIdReg`），按行对齐地址 `axiaddr`，发 AR（`prot=2`、`id=0`）；
- AR 被接受 → 等 R；R 到来 → 把数据写进 SRAM（`mem.io.write := axiready`），`valid(replaceIdReg) := true.B`。

其中 [L1ICache.scala:229-235](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L229-L235) 同时把对齐地址写进 `camaddr(replaceId)`，让后续命中能匹配。`io.ibus.ready := found`（[L1ICache.scala:191](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L191)）保证缺失期间 ibus 反压。

**整表刷写**：

[L1ICache.scala:219-227](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L219-L227)：`io.flush.valid` 优先级最高，一拍把所有 `valid(i)` 清零；[L1ICache.scala:244](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L244) `io.flush.ready := true.B`——I-cache 刷写即时完成，因为指令只读、无需写回。

#### 4.1.4 代码实践

**实践目标**：手算 L1I 的地址划分，并核对源码注释与断言；再走一遍「缺失→填充」的控制流。

**操作步骤（源码阅读型）**：

1. 打开 [L1ICache.scala:30-60](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L30-L60)，分别对 `fetchDataBits=256` 和 `fetchDataBits=128` 计算 Tag/Index/Offset 的位段，并验证是否落入第 56–59 行的某一条 `assert`。
2. 追踪一次缺失：从 `io.ibus.valid && !io.ibus.ready` 开始，依次标注 `replaceIdReg`、`axivalid`、`axiready`、`mem.io.write`、`valid(replaceIdReg)` 这几个状态在第几拍变化。
3. （可选，待本地验证）尝试独立发射 L1I 的 SystemVerilog：`bazel build //hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu:l1icache_cc_library`（目标名见 [BUILD:813-821](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/BUILD#L813-L821)），在 `bazel-bin` 下找到生成的 `L1ICache.sv`，确认它是一个**顶层无父模块**的独立 IP。

**需要观察的现象**：

- 256 位配置下位段应为 Tag[31:11]/Index[10:5]/Offset[4:0]，与顶部注释一致；128 位配置下 Index 仍占 6 位（64 组不变），Offset 缩到 4 位。
- 一次缺失至少经历「发 AR → 接受 AR → 等 R → 写 SRAM」四拍控制信号翻转。

**预期结果**：手算位段与 `assert` 完全吻合；缺失填充控制流能用一张 4 拍时序表画出来。环境相关命令的运行结果**待本地验证**。

#### 4.1.5 小练习与答案

**Q1**：为什么 L1I 的刷写可以「单拍完成、立即 ready」，而 L1D（4.3 节）不行？
**答**：L1I 是只读 cache，行内数据与外部存储始终一致（不会被核写过），没有「脏行」概念，失效即可；L1D 有写操作会产生脏行，刷脏行前必须先经 AXI 写回外部存储，所以要走一个多拍 FSM。

**Q2**：`history` 计数器复位为 `0,1,2,3`（4 路时）。第一次访问地址 A 命中路 0 后，再访问同组的地址 B（缺失），B 会替换哪一路？
**答**：A 命中路 0 后，路 0 计数器置为 3（最大），其余路 1/2/3 因为原值都 ≤ 命中路原值 0 而不递减；此时计数器为 `3,1,2,3`？——注意递减条件是 `> matchValue`（命中路原值 0），1/2/3 都 > 0 故都递减，得 `3,0,1,2`。于是计数器为 0 的是路 1，B 替换路 1。（练习目的：体会「命中路置最大、其余递减」如何把刚用过的路推到最不容易被替换的位置。）

### 4.2 L1 数据 Cache：双 bank、对齐缓冲与脏行写回

#### 4.2.1 概念说明

L1 数据 Cache（L1D）解决的问题是：「**标量核做循环控制与地址生成、SIMD/RVV 后端做大批量数据搬运时，如何用一块 cached SRAM 桥接慢速外部存储**」。它比 L1I 复杂得多，因为：

- 它是**可读可写**的，需要脏位与写回（writeback）。
- 官方为它选了**双 bank**结构，每 bank 8KB、4 路，合计 16KB。
- 它还兼任**对齐缓冲**：标量与 SIMD 访存的位宽/对齐各异，cache 帮忙把数据摆齐，简化软件。

设计意图（官方原话，[overview.md:80-91](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/doc/overview.md#L80-L91)）：

> The L1Icache is 8KB (256b blocks × 256 slots) with 4-way set associativity. … The L1Dcache is 16KB (SIMD256b) with low set associativity of 4-way. The L1Dcache is implemented with a **dual bank architecture where each bank is 8KB** (similar to L1Icache). This property allows for a degree of **next line prefetch**. … the L1Dcache provides **half of the memory bandwidth to the ML outer-product engine** when only a single external memory port is provided. Line and all entry flushing is supported where **the core stalls until completion** to simplify the contract.

这段话里的三个关键点——「双 bank」「next line prefetch / 一半带宽」「刷写时 stall」——分别对应 4.2、4.2、4.3 三节。

#### 4.2.2 核心流程

L1D 分两层（见 [L1DCache.scala:38-51](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L38-L51)）：

- **顶层 `L1DCache`**：实例化 `bank0`、`bank1` 两个 `L1DCacheBank`，负责把一条 `dbus` 请求**拆/路由到两个 bank**、把两个 bank 的读数据**重新交织**回一条总线、并在两个 bank 之间**仲裁对外 AXI**。
- **`L1DCacheBank`**：单 bank 的 cache 核心，结构与 L1I 同构（CAM + 计数伪 LRU + AXI 填充），但增加了**脏位、写回、ECC、刷写 FSM**。

**双 bank 交织**：相邻两行轮流放在两个 bank——地址的 `linebit` 位（行地址最低位）为 0 的行进 bank0，为 1 的进 bank1。`BankInAddress` 把这一位摘掉得到 bank 内地址，`BankOutAddress` 对外 AXI 时再按 bank 号插回去（[L1DCache.scala:57-70](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L57-L70)）。

**一次访问两行**：`DBusIO` 同时携带 `addr` 和 `adrx`，源码断言 `adrx === addr + linebytes`（[L1DCache.scala:85](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L85)），即相邻下一行。由于相邻两行必然落在不同 bank，于是**一拍内两个 bank 各读一行**，相当于一拍吐出 2 倍单 bank 带宽——这就是官方所说的「next line prefetch」与「为 ML 引擎提供一半（额外）内存带宽」的物理基础。

**写回**：当一次缺失要替换一个**脏** slot 时，cache 不能直接覆盖，必须先把旧行读出来经 AXI 写回外部，再把新行读进来。`L1DCacheBank` 用 `ractive`（读填充在途）和 `wactive`（写回在途）两个标志串起这个「读旧→写回→填新」流程。

#### 4.2.3 源码精读

**顶层双 bank 与地址路由**：

[L1DCache.scala:53-82](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L53-L82) 是双 bank 的精髓。`lineend` 判定一次访问是否横跨两行；`dsel0`/`dsel1` 决定激活哪个 bank；`preread`（[L1DCache.scala:80](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L80)）在「4KB 范围内的读」时把另一个 bank 也预激活，呼应「next line prefetch」。

`addrA`/`addrB`（[L1DCache.scala:81-82](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L81-L82)）按 `addr(linebit)` 把 `addr`/`adrx` 分别派给两个 bank，保证主行进主 bank、次行进次 bank。[L1DCache.scala:99-115](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L99-L115) 把译好的总线信号接给两个 bank；写掩码 `wmaskSA`/`wmaskSB`（[L1DCache.scala:88-96](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L88-L96)）把一次写的字节选通切成两半，分别落到正确的 bank。

**读数据重新交织**：

[L1DCache.scala:120-143](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L120-L143)：两个 bank 各自读出一行（16/32 字节），`rsel` 逐字节标注每个字节来自哪个 bank，`RData()` 递归地把它们按正确顺序 `Cat` 回一条 `lsuDataBits` 宽的总线。这就是「对齐缓冲」的实现：无论访问如何跨行，输出永远是一段连续对齐的数据。

**对外 AXI 仲裁（读/写各一套）**：

[L1DCache.scala:163-185](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L163-L185)（读）和 [L1DCache.scala:189-245](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L189-L245)（写）：两个 bank 共享一条对外 AXI，用 **id 的最高位**区分响应归属（`rresp0`/`rresp1`、`wresp0`/`wresp1`），并在地址通道上轮流仲裁（`raxi0`/`waxi0` 优先 bank0）。`BankOutAddress` 在出门前把 bank 选位插回地址。

**单 bank 核心：ECC SRAM + 脏位**：

[L1DCache.scala:269-271](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L269-L271) 的注释写出 8KB/4 路的规格；[L1DCache.scala:320-327](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L320-L327) 的 `assert` 链用 `checkBit`（128 位时=4、256 位时=5）把位段边界焊死——这是核对 bank 容量的真相源（注意顶部注释里的 `Data[5,0]` 反映的是更宽的 512 位历史配置，**以 assert 为准**）。

ECC：数据阵列是 `Sram_1rwm_256x288`（[L1DCache.scala:329-340](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L329-L340)），每字节 9 位（8 数据 + 1 校验），所以 256 位数据变成 288 位存储。`Mem8to9`/`Mem9to8`/`Mem9to1`（[L1DCache.scala:292-318](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L292-L318)）在写入/读出时做 8↔9 位转换，维持逐字节校验位——这与 u9-l3 的总线 SECDED 同源思想，只是作用在 cache SRAM 内部。

`L1DCacheBank` 比 L1I 多一个 `dirty` 寄存器向量（[L1DCache.scala:352-355](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L352-L355)）：每次写命中置脏（[L1DCache.scala:518-520](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L518-L520)）。

**脏行写回**：

[L1DCache.scala:500-516](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L500-L516)：缺失且替换 slot 脏时，置 `wactive`，发 `memwaddrEn`/`memwdataEn` 把脏行从 SRAM 读出。[L1DCache.scala:532-538](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L532-L538) 用 `Mem9to8`/`Mem9to1` 把它转成纯数据+选通，发一次单拍 AXI 写（`last=true`，[L1DCache.scala:567](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L567)）；等 BRESP 到来（[L1DCache.scala:548-550](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L548-L550)）才清 `wactive`。读填充（`ractive`）与之串行，体现「同时只允许一个在途事务」。

#### 4.2.4 代码实践

**实践目标**：吃透「双 bank 如何一次访问两行」与「脏行写回」两条数据通路。

**操作步骤（源码阅读型）**：

1. **双 bank 路由**：假设 `lsuDataBits=256`（`linebit=5`，`linebytes=32`），给定 `io.dbus.addr = 0x00000040`（行地址位 `addr(5)=0`）且 `adrx = 0x00000060`。打开 [L1DCache.scala:81-115](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L81-L115)，回答：`addrA`/`addrB` 分别送给 bank0 还是 bank1？`dsel0`/`dsel1` 各为何值？
2. **读交织**：继续追 [L1DCache.scala:120-143](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L120-L143) 的 `RData()`，说明两个 bank 各 32 字节的读数据如何拼成一条连续的 64 字节序列（即两行）。
3. **脏行写回**：在 [L1DCache.scala:500-550](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L500-L550) 里，按时间顺序列出 `ractive`、`wactive`、`memwaddrEn`、`axiwaddrvalid`、`axiwdatavalid`、`io.axi.write.resp` 这几个信号在「替换一个脏行」时的翻转顺序。
4. （可选，待本地验证）`bazel build //hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu:l1dcache_cc_library` 与 `:l1dcachebank_cc_library`（[BUILD:793-811](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/BUILD#L793-L811)），在生成的 `L1DCache.sv` 里确认顶层实例化了两个 `L1DCacheBank`。

**需要观察的现象**：相邻两行的请求被无冲突地分到两个 bank；脏行写回严格「先于」新行填充完成。

**预期结果**：能画出「一条 dbus 请求 → 两个 bank 并行读 → RData 交织」与「脏行：读 SRAM→AXI 写→BRESP→读填充」两张时序图。运行命令的产物路径**待本地验证**。

#### 4.2.5 小练习与答案

**Q1**：为什么把相邻行交替放在两个 bank（而不是 bank0 放低半地址、bank1 放高半地址）？
**答**：交替（按 `linebit` 交织）保证任意两个**相邻**行一定分属不同 bank，于是 `addr`+`adrx(=addr+行宽)` 这一对连续访问能在一拍内被两个 bank 并行服务，实现 2× 带宽。若按地址高低半划分，连续访问会落在同一 bank，带宽退化为 1×。

**Q2**：L1D 的数据 SRAM 为什么是 288 位宽而不是 256 位？
**答**：每字节多存 1 位校验（9 位/字节），256 位数据 × 9/8 = 288 位，用于检测存储内部的比特错误（ECC）。这也是 `Mem8to9`/`Mem9to8` 转换函数存在的原因。

**Q3**：`axiwdatavalid` 伴随的 `last` 为什么恒为 `true`（[L1DCache.scala:567](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L567)）？
**答**：一行刚好等于 AXI 数据位宽（256 位 = 一个 beat），所以一次写回只发一个数据 beat，`last` 自然恒真。

---

### 4.3 刷写语义与「内核 stall 到完成」契约

#### 4.3.1 概念说明

任何带写回 D-cache 的系统都必须提供「让软件主动把脏数据写回、并让取指看到最新数据」的手段。CoralNPU 在标量 ISA 里提供了三条 LSU 操作（[Lsu.scala:80-82、113-114](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala#L80-L82)）：

- **`FENCEI`**（`fence.i`）：同步「数据写」与「后续取指」。CoralNPU 的实现是——**失效整张 I-cache 并把取指引向 `pc+4`**。
- **`FLUSHALL`**：把整张 D-cache 的脏行全部写回（并按 `clean` 决定是否同时失效）。
- **`FLUSHAT`**：按地址刷写**指定行**（`all=false`，用 `dbus.addr` 指定）。

官方契约很直白：「**the core stalls until completion to simplify the contract**」——刷写期间内核停拍，直到刷写完成，软件无需自己轮询。

#### 4.3.2 核心流程

刷写由 LSU 发起、经 SCore 路由、最终落到 cache（或取指单元）：

1. 派发器只在「LSU 空闲、且在首槽」时发射 flush 指令（[Lsu.scala:854-856](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala#L854-L856) 注释）。
2. LSU 把指令翻译成 `FlushCmd`（[Lsu.scala:829-836](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala#L829-L836)）：`all := FENCEI|FLUSHALL`、`fencei := (op==FENCEI)`、`pcNext := pc+4`，并永远 `clean := true`。
3. SCore 按 `fencei` 标志二选一路由（[SCore.scala:104-114](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/SCore.scala#L104-L114)）：
   - `fencei` → `iflush.valid`（I 侧失效 + 取指重定向到 `pcNext`）；
   - 否则（`FLUSHALL`/`FLUSHAT`）→ `dflush.valid`（D 侧刷写）。
4. **LSU 的 `flush.ready` 取决于所选路径完成**：`Mux(fencei, fetch.io.iflush.ready, io.dflush.ready)`。在 ready 之前，flush 指令不退休，派发被屏障——这就是「内核 stall」。
5. D-cache 的 `L1DCacheBank` 用一个 8 态 FSM（`FlushState`）完成「逐脏行写回 + 按需失效」，直到全部 BRESP 收齐才置 `io.flush.ready`。

#### 4.3.3 源码精读

**LSU 侧的 flush 翻译**：

[Lsu.scala:822-836](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala#L822-L836)：`FlushCmd.apply` 把一条 LSU 指令转成 `{all, fencei, pcNext}`。注意 `all` 同时覆盖 `FENCEI` 和 `FLUSHALL`，而 `FLUSHAT`（按行）`all=false`。

[Lsu.scala:857-870](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala#L857-L870)：`flushCmd` 寄存器在「收到新 flush」与「flush 完成（`valid && ready`）」之间翻转。`io.flush.clean := true.B` 恒真，意味着 CoralNPU 的刷写总是「写回 + 失效」，不保留 clean-but-valid 行。

**SCore 侧的路由与 stall**：

[SCore.scala:104-114](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/SCore.scala#L104-L114)：

- `io.dflush.valid := lsu.io.flush.valid && !fencei`；
- `io.iflush.valid := lsu.io.flush.valid && fencei`，`io.iflush.pcNext := pcNext`；
- `lsu.io.flush.ready := Mux(fencei, fetch.io.iflush.ready, io.dflush.ready)`。

也就是说，`fence.i` **只**触发 I 侧（I-cache 失效 + 取指重定向），**不**触发 D-cache 刷写；`flushall/flushat` 只触发 D 侧。LSU 在所选路径 `ready` 之前一直被挂起，派发屏障天然形成「内核 stall」。

> 说明：在当前 HEAD 的生产数据通路里，`iflush` 实际驱动的是取指单元（`Fetch`/`UncachedFetch`）的 `IFlushIO`，使其冲刷内部指令缓冲并从 `pcNext` 重取；`L1ICache` 模块实现了同一个 `IFlushIO`（[L1ICache.scala:219-244](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L219-L244)），供 cached 配置使用。两套实现遵循同一契约。

**D-cache 的刷写状态机（`L1DCacheBank`）**：

[L1DCache.scala:468-473](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L468-L473) 定义状态枚举 `sNone→sCapture→sProcess→sMemwaddr→sMemwdata→sAxiready→（回 sProcess）…→sAxiresp→sEnd`。

[L1DCache.scala:595-667](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L595-L667) 是 FSM 主体：

- `sCapture`（[L1DCache.scala:603-611](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L603-L611)）：构建 `flush` 向量——`all` 时取所有脏 slot，否则只取命中的那一行。
- `sProcess`（[L1DCache.scala:613-621](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L613-L621)）：`flush` 向量空了就进 `sAxiresp`；否则取最低位脏 slot（`Ctz(flush)`，[L1DCache.scala:589](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L589)）进 `sMemwaddr`。
- `sMemwaddr/sMemwdata`（[L1DCache.scala:623-637](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L623-L637)）：读出脏行、清脏位、（`clean` 时）清有效位。
- `sAxiready`（[L1DCache.scala:639-644](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L639-L644)）：等这一行的 AXI 写地址+数据被接受，回 `sProcess` 处理下一脏行。
- `sAxiresp`（[L1DCache.scala:646-650](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L646-L650)）：等所有在途写响应计数 `wrespcnt` 归零。
- `sEnd`（[L1DCache.scala:652-666](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L652-L666)）：`clean && all` 时把全部 slot 失效；最后 `io.flush.ready` 才拉高（[L1DCache.scala:669](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L669)）。

**stall 契约的硬件体现**：

[L1DCache.scala:671](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L671) `assert(!(io.flush.valid && io.dbus.valid))`——刷写期间绝不允许新的 dbus 访存；配合 LSU/SCore 的派发屏障，整个核在刷写完成前彻底停拍，软件无需轮询，正是「simplify the contract」。

#### 4.3.4 代码实践

**实践目标**：把一条 `fence.i` 与一条 `flushall` 从 ISA 到 cache FSM 完整走通。

**操作步骤（源码阅读型）**：

1. 在 [Lsu.scala:80-82、829-836](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala#L80-L82) 确认三条 flush 指令的 `all`/`fencei` 取值。
2. 在 [SCore.scala:104-114](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/SCore.scala#L104-L114) 判定：`fence.i` 走哪条路径？`flushall` 走哪条？两者的 `ready` 分别依赖谁？
3. 画出 `L1DCacheBank` 的 `FlushState` 状态转移图（8 个状态），标注每条转移的条件，并指出「多脏行」时哪几个状态会循环。
4. （可选，待本地验证）写一段 C 伪代码：先向 DTCM/cached 区写若干字、执行 `flushall`、再改写同一片区域作为「新指令」、执行 `fence.i`、最后调用这些「新指令」。说明每一步硬件 stall 在哪里、何时恢复。

**需要观察的现象**：

- `fence.i` 不触发 D-cache FSM，只失效 I 侧并重定向 PC；`flushall` 触发 D-cache FSM，多脏行时 `sProcess↔sMemwaddr↔sMemwdata↔sAxiready` 会循环多次。
- 整个 flush 期间 `io.dbus.valid` 必须为 0（否则触发 [L1DCache.scala:671](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L671) 的断言失败）。

**预期结果**：能给出 `fence.i` 与 `flushall` 各自完整的「ISA→LSU→SCore→cache」信号链。实际仿真波形**待本地验证**。

#### 4.3.5 小练习与答案

**Q1**：为什么 `fence.i` 在 SCore 里**不**触发 `dflush`？
**答**：CoralNPU 的 `fence.i` 语义被实现为「失效 I-cache + 从 `pc+4` 重取」。它假设需要被取指看到的数据已经处在对取指可见的存储（如 ITCM 或一致性外部存储）中，故只需冲 I 侧。若软件把「未来指令」写在 cached 且写回的 D 区，则需先 `flushall` 再 `fence.i`——这是软件的责任。

**Q2**：`wrespcnt`（[L1DCache.scala:577-585](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L577-L585)）在刷写 FSM 里起什么作用？
**答**：它跟踪「已发出去但还没收到 BRESP」的 AXI 写事务数（发地址 +1，收响应 -1）。`sAxiresp` 要等它归零才能进 `sEnd`，保证所有脏行确实被外部存储接收后才宣告刷写完成。

**Q3**：`io.flush.clean` 恒为 `true`（[Lsu.scala:860](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/scalar/Lsu.scala#L860)）意味着什么？
**答**：CoralNPU 的刷写永远是「写回 + 失效」（clean），不提供「只写回但保留有效」的选项。刷写完成后，被刷的行在 cache 里不再命中，下次访问必然重新从外部取——用「干净」换「简单」。

---

## 5. 综合实践

把本讲三节串起来，完成下面这张「**L1 Cache 全规格核对表**」（假设默认配置 `fetchDataBits=256`、`lsuDataBits=256`）：

| 项目 | L1I | L1D（每 bank / 合计） |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 总容量 | 8KB | 8KB / 16KB |
| 行宽 | 256 位（32B） | 256 位（32B，另 +32b ECC） |
| 相联度 | 4 路 | 4 路 |
| 组数 | 64 | 64 |
| Tag/Index/Offset 位段 | Tag[31:11]/Index[10:5]/Off[4:0] | Tag[30:11]/Index[10:5]/Off[4:0]（bank 内，bank 位在 linebit） |
| 替换策略 | 计数式伪 LRU | 计数式伪 LRU |
| 写策略 | 只读 | 写回（dirty 位） |
| 刷写 | 整表单拍失效 | 8 态 FSM，逐脏行写回 + 失效 |

任务：

1. 逐格用 [L1ICache.scala:30-60](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L30-L60) 与 [L1DCache.scala:269-327](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L269-L327) 的源码/断言验证（注意 L1D 顶部注释的 `Data[5,0]` 是历史 512 位配置，**以 assert 为准**）。
2. 写两段时序伪代码（文字即可）：
   - **cached 标量 load 缺失且替换脏行**：标注 `ractive`/`wactive`/`memwaddrEn`/AXI 写/AXI 读/BRESP 的先后。
   - **`fence.i` 序列**：标注 LSU→SCore→`iflush`→取指重定向，以及内核在哪一拍 stall、哪一拍恢复。
3. 最后回答一个开放题：既然 `L1ICache`/`L1DCache` 当前未被实例化进生产 SoC，那 [overview.md:74-91](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/doc/overview.md#L74-L91) 描述的「为 ML 外积引擎提供一半内存带宽」在今天的硬件上是如何兑现的？（提示：回到 u6-l2 的 TCM 与 fabric 带宽，以及 u7 的 RVV 后端如何从 TCM 取数；L1D 的双 bank 设计是为「单外部端口 + cached」场景预留的能力。）

## 6. 本讲小结

- CoralNPU 的 **L1I = 8KB / 4 路 / 256b 行**，**L1D = 16KB（双 bank × 8KB）/ 4 路 / 256b 行**；容量与相联度的真相源是 `Parameters` 与两份源码里的 `assert` 链，而非源码顶部注释（后者含历史配置）。
- 两块 cache 都用「**CAM 查找 + 计数式伪 LRU 替换**」，且都遵守「**同时只允许一个在途事务**」的简化约束。
- L1D 的**双 bank 交织**让一次 `addr`+`adrx(=addr+行宽)` 访问在一拍内并行读出相邻两行，这就是官方说的「next line prefetch」与「为 ML 引擎提供一半（额外）内存带宽」的物理基础；它还兼任标量/SIMD 的**对齐缓冲**。
- L1D 用 `dirty` 位 + `ractive`/`wactive` 实现**写回**；脏行替换时先经 AXI 写回旧行、再读填充新行。
- 刷写分两条路：`fence.i` → I 侧整表失效 + 取指重定向；`flushall/flushat` → D 侧 8 态 FSM 逐脏行写回 + 失效。**刷写期间内核 stall 到完成**（`assert(!(flush.valid && dbus.valid))` + 派发屏障），软件无需轮询。
- **重要事实**：当前 HEAD 下 `L1ICache`/`L1DCache` 是**独立可发射的 IP 块**（BUILD 目标 `l1icache_cc_library`/`l1dcache_cc_library`/`l1dcachebank_cc_library`），**未被实例化进生产数据通路**；生产 SoC 用 `enableFetchL0=False`+`lsuDataBits=128` 并以 TCM 为主存。cache 的设计意图见 [overview.md:74-91](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/doc/overview.md#L74-L91)（**不是** microarch.md）。

## 7. 下一步学习建议

- **向外看总线保护**：本讲看到 L1D 的 SRAM 用了逐字节 ECC（9 位/字节），下一讲可进入 u9-l3，看 TileLink 总线层面的 `TlulIntegrity`/SECDED 如何与这一思想呼应。
- **向内看 RVV 后端如何消费带宽**：本讲反复提到「为 ML 外积引擎提供带宽」。建议进入单元 7（u7-l1 起），看 RVV 后端的向量访存如何经 `rvv2lsu`/`lsu2rvv` 与存储子系统交互，从而理解「双 bank 带宽」真正被谁吃掉。
- **若要做 cached 配置实验**：可尝试把 `L1ICache`/`L1DCache` 接进一个自定义顶层（实例化在 `Fetch.ibus`/LSU 的 ebus 与 AXI 之间），用 cocotb（u2-l4）写一个先写后 `flushall`+`fence.i` 再执行的测试，观察本讲描述的 stall 契约——这是一条很有价值的二次开发练习路径。

# L1 指令/数据 Cache

## 1. 本讲目标

学完本讲后，你应该能够：

- 说清 CoralNPU 的 **L1 指令 Cache（L1I）** 的容量、相联度、行宽与地址划分（Tag/Index/Offset），并解释它如何用「CAM + 计数式伪 LRU」完成命中判定与替换。
- 说清 **L1 数据 Cache（L1D）** 的「双 bank、每 bank 8KB、4 路」结构，以及为什么双 bank 能在一次访问里同时读出相邻两行（被官方文档称为「next line prefetch」与「为 ML 外积引擎提供一半内存带宽」）。
- 复述 **D-cache 写回 + 脏行回收** 的状态机，以及 `fence.i` / `flushall` / `flushat` 三类刷写指令如何驱动 `IFlushIO`/`DFlushIO`，并理解「**刷写期间内核 stall 到完成**」这一契约。
- 读懂 `L1ICache.scala` 与 `L1DCache.scala` 两份 Chisel 源码，并能对照 `overview.md` 的 Cache 章节核对设计意图。

> ⚠️ 关于文档：本讲主题里的「microarch.md 的 Cache 章节」在实际仓库中**并不存在**。`doc/microarch/microarch.md` 只写了流水线与指令延迟表，没有 Cache 段落。Cache 的官方设计意图写在 [`doc/overview.md:74-91`](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/doc/overview.md#L74-L91)，本讲以此为准，并始终用源码核对。

## 2. 前置知识

在进入本讲前，请先建立几个直觉（这些在 u6-l2、u4-l2 已有铺垫，这里只做定位）。

**第一，CoralNPU 的主存储是 TCM，不是 Cache。** ITCM（8KB@`0x0`）放代码、DTCM（32KB@`0x10000`）放数据，都是单拍可访问、地址固定、无 tag 检查的「紧耦合存储」。run-to-completion 的 ML 负载追求**可预测的时序**，所以 TCM 才是主力（详见 u6-l2）。

**第二，Cache 是「溢出到外部存储时的开销配角」。** 官方原话是：

> Caches exists as a single layer between the core and the first level of shared SRAM. The L1 cache and scalar core frontend are an **overhead** to the rest of the backend compute pipeline and ideally are as small as possible.
> —— [overview.md:76-78](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/doc/overview.md#L76-L78)

也就是说：当程序/数据超过了 TCM 容量、必须放在外部 SRAM（经 AXI 访问）时，才需要 L1 Cache 来 amortize（摊薄）外部访问的高延迟。

**第三，先分清三个「I 侧缓存」概念，不要混淆：**

| 名称 | 位置 | 容量 | 是否在当前生产数据通路中 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| L0ICache | `Fetch` 取指单元内部 | 1KB（`fetchCacheBytes`） | 否（生产 `enableFetchL0=False`，走 `UncachedFetch`） |
| **L1ICache** | `Fetch.ibus` 与 AXI 之间的独立模块 | **8KB** | **否（见下方说明）** |
| ITCM | SoC fabric 中 | 8KB | 是（主存） |

**第四，一个必须先说清的事实（本讲的诚实声明）。** `L1ICache.scala`、`L1DCache.scala` 这两个模块在当前 HEAD 是**独立可发射（emittable）的 RTL 模块**：它们各自有 `EmitL1ICache`/`EmitL1DCache` App 对象和 BUILD 目标（`l1icache_cc_library`、`l1dcache_cc_library`、`l1dcachebank_cc_library`），可以单独生成 SystemVerilog；但**它们没有被任何顶层（Core / SCore / CoralNPUChiselSubsystem）实例化进数据通路**。可以在全树搜索 `new L1ICache` / `new L1DCache` 验证：唯一命中是它们自身的 `apply` 工厂方法（[L1ICache.scala:24-28](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1ICache.scala#L24-L28)、[L1DCache.scala:26-36](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/1406dc5a856fe5edb2193ce35640b6afe4d8be73/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/L1DCache.scala#L26-L36)）。

> 结论：本讲讲解的是「**Cache 硬件本身如何实现**」——这是两份源码的全部价值所在。它们是 CoralNPU 为「需要外部 cached 存储的配置」准备的、经过独立发射/验证的 IP 块。至于「刷写语义」这一节，我们会看到对应的 ISA 与 LSU/SCore 联动（`fence.i`/`flushall`/`flushat`）是**在线生效**的：它当前驱动的是取指单元的 `IFlushIO`，而 `L1ICache`/`L1DCache` 实现了同一套 flush 接口，作为 cached 数据通路的参考实现。

**术语速查：**

- **Cache 行（line/block）**：cache 与外部存储之间一次搬移的最小单位。L1I/L1D 的行宽都是 256 位（32 字节）。
- **组相联（set-associative）**：把所有 slot 分成若干「组」，一个地址只可能落在某一组里的某一路（way）。
- **CAM（Content-Addressable Memory）**：这里指「拿地址当 key，并行比较所有 slot 的 tag」的查找方式。
- **伪 LRU**：用计数器近似「最近最少使用」的替换策略。
- **脏位（dirty）**：一个 cache 行被写过、与外部存储不一致时置 1；替换/刷写前必须写回。
- **stall**：内核停拍等待某操作完成。
